ranked_movies.title: Tremors
ranked_movies.reason: Subject of a dedicated post with high engagement, extensively analyzed for its perfect blend of horror and comedy, practical effects, and character dynamics. Considered a benchmark for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in discussions of both religious themes and general quality. Has a large cult following that consistently references it in various contexts.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Sleep
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a classic example of a complex plot that is actually confusing due to its production history, not just narrative complexity.

ranked_movies.title: Mulholland Drive
ranked_movies.reason: Brought up multiple times as a movie that is genuinely confusing and requires multiple viewings. Heavily discussed in film communities.

ranked_movies.title: Synecdoche, New York
ranked_movies.reason: Similar to Mulholland Drive, mentioned in the same context of complex, mind-bending narratives.

ranked_movies.title: Logan
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a movie that exceeded expectations, transitioning superhero films into more serious drama.

ranked_movies.title: Starship Troopers
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as an underrated film that is much better than people expect, with deeper themes.

ranked_movies.title: Galaxy Quest
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned alongside Starship Troopers as a film that was surprisingly good, with a strong fanbase.

ranked_movies.title: Dredd
ranked_movies.reason: Brought up as an example of a great action film that didn't get its due, with strong community support.

ranked_movies.title: The Lego Movie
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as surprisingly good for what it is, with deeper themes than expected.

ranked_movies.title: The Emperor's New Groove
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a film that overcame production issues to become a classic, better than expected.

ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned multiple times as a benchmark of quality, though more as a reference than a main topic.
